nativeSnippet: const ffprobeJson = JSON.stringify({ format: { duration: "2.0" }, streams: [ ... ] });
note: Builds a fixed ffprobe-output fixture string. The internal FfprobeOutput schema in FFmpeg.service.ts models this exact shape but is not exported, so no public schema is reachable from the test. Model/export an ffprobe-output schema and use S.encodeUnknownEffect(S.fromJsonString(schema)); fall back to S.UnknownFromJsonString otherwise. Note this is a synchronous test fixture, so an Effect-returning encoder changes call-site shape.
